---
title: "Other Tools"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
---

## AFHI Hearing Tests

The Australian Future Hearing Initiative provides a suite of web-based hearing tests:

* **Consonant Confusion Test**: Take the test at [https://afhi-consonant-confusion.streamlit.app/](https://afhi-consonant-confusion.streamlit.app/)
* **Pure-Tone Audiometry**: Try the demo release at [https://afhi-pure-tone-audiometry.streamlit.app/](https://afhi-pure-tone-audiometry.streamlit.app/)
* **Hearing Tests Repository**: Explore the source code on [GitHub](https://github.com/Australian-Future-Hearing-Initiative/hearing-tests) (licensed under CC-BY-NC).

---

## Acoustic & Hearing Models

* Explore models and datasets at the [prism-ml repository](https://github.com/Australian-Future-Hearing-Initiative/prism-ml)
